final:
module adder(
    input clk, rst, ctrl,
    input [7:0] a, b,
    output reg [15:0] sum
);

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (rst) begin
        sum <= 0;
    end else if (ctrl) begin
        sum <= a + b;
    end
end

endmodule
